description: Wire the new analyses through compile() so they reach compile_fn / emit_call / emit_return as data, even before behavior diverges. No ABI change. Asserts natively_callable.is_empty() (no fns native-callable yet) AND tracks return Descr per fn. Clears the dead-code warnings on parking_reachable + natively_callable. Sets up the data plumbing for .6.2.2-.6.2.5.
title: VR.4.2.1: plumb parking + natively_callable + return Descr analyses into codegen
